word: G1888 - ἐπαυτοφώρῳ - epautophṓrōi - ep-ow-tof-o'-ro - In the very act

sections.paragraph:
ἐπαυτοφώρῳ - epautophōrō - ep-ow-tof-o'-ro

From G1909 and G846 and (the dative singular of) a derivative of φώρ phōr (a thief); in theft itself, that is, (by analogy) in actual crime: - in the very act.
